page.title: Overview
page.description: Protocol-wide snapshot of every Meteora pool the indexer has observed: total value locked, 24h activity, and discovery.

topPools.title: Top pools by 24h volume
topPools.empty: No pool has recorded volume in the last 24h.

latestSignals.title: Latest signals
latestSignals.empty: No signal yet — the detectors are watching.

page.title: Pools
page.description: All Meteora liquidity pools observed by the indexer. Click any row to open the pool's detail page.

empty.title: No pools observed yet
empty.description: The indexer is running but hasn't captured any pool activity yet. Pools will appear here as soon as on-chain events are picked up.

error.title: Unable to load pools
error.timeout: The upstream service took too long to respond. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
error.network: The upstream service is unreachable. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
error.http: The upstream service returned an error.
error.validation: The upstream service returned an unexpected response.

noResults.title: No pool matches "{query}"
noResults.hint: Check the spelling or try another term.

fees.title: Fees
fees.empty: No fee activity in the selected window yet.

swaps.title: Recent swaps
swaps.empty: No swaps observed yet for this pool. They will appear here as soon as on-chain trade events are picked up.

liquidity.title: Recent liquidity events
liquidity.empty: No liquidity events observed yet for this pool. They will appear here as soon as on-chain add/remove events are picked up.

meta.title: Pool {address}
meta.description: Real-time activity, liquidity, and trade history for a Meteora pool observed by the Yog-Scope indexer.

notFound.title: Pool not found
notFound.description: No pool with this address has been observed yet by the indexer. It may not exist, or it may be on a protocol Yog-Scope doesn't track.

BlockError.timeout: This section couldn't be loaded — the upstream service took too long to respond.
BlockError.network: This section couldn't be loaded — the upstream service is unreachable.
BlockError.http: This section couldn't be loaded — the upstream service returned an error.
BlockError.validation: This section couldn't be loaded — the upstream service returned an unexpected response.

PageError.title: Unable to load this page
PageError.timeout: The upstream service took too long to respond. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
PageError.network: The upstream service is unreachable. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
PageError.http: The upstream service returned an error.
PageError.validation: The upstream service returned an unexpected response.

page.title: Signals
page.description: Live feed of the detectors' conclusions: flow imbalances, price deviations — every anomaly worth a look, as it is detected.

feed.title: Latest signals
feed.empty: No signal yet — the detectors are watching.

price_oracle_deviation.summary: The pool's price is {deviation} away from the oracle price.

flow_imbalance.summary: Swap volume leans {percent} in one direction.
